declarations.description:
Purpose: Integrates a main action button (`mc-button`) with a dropdown menu (`mc-menu`), allowing users to easily perform the main action and choose from additional options, all within a single, space-saving component.
Category: Actions, Navigation
When to use: Use when you want to present a main action (e.g., "Save", "Download") and offer additional options via a dropdown, reducing clutter and grouping related actions together.
When not to use: Avoid when only one action is needed, or when all actions should be equally visible and accessible as separate buttons.
Works with components: mc-list, mc-list-item
Alternative component names: Dropdown Button, Action Menu Button
declarations.name: McSplitButton

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of the main button
cssParts.name: `button`

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of the menu button
cssParts.name: `split-button-menu`

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of the main button icon
cssParts.name: `icon`

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of the menu button icon (chevron)
cssParts.name: `split-button-icon`

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of the text and icons container
cssParts.name: `text-and-icon`

slots.description: The default slot for the button label. Used to display custom text/HTML content in the button.
The icon HTML to use for the button.
slots.name: `icon`

slots.description: Content for the dropdown menu. Pass <mc-list> with <mc-list-item> elements and bind events directly to mc-list (e.g., @listchange).
slots.name: `menu`

events.description: Emitted when the button is clicked
events.name: `click`

events.description: Emitted when the button receives focus
events.name: `focus`

events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus
events.name: `blur`
